title: passerina rubra
intro: Passerina rubra, also known as the Purple Sage, is a perennial shrub native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Passerina rubra can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its purported health benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
